executionArgs.additionalInstruction: App runs at http://localhost:5173. It is a React SPA with React Router. Footer is at the bottom of the landing page (/). Static pages: /privacy, /terms, /contact. Login page has a Back button (ArrowLeft icon) to return to /. After entering a phone number and clicking Get OTP, the OTP step shows 6 individual single-digit input boxes. Theme toggle button is in the top navbar — clicking it switches dark/light mode. localStorage key is 'samplebook_theme' with values 'dark' or 'light'. Unknown routes redirect back to / per App.jsx catch-all route.
